name: rosie-mcp-plugin
description: Codex plugin for the Rosie remote MCP server, service discovery, and case-manager query evaluation workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Rosie resource discovery, search QA, and case-manager evaluation guidance.
interface.longDescription: Installs the hosted Rosie MCP server and adds skills that help agents navigate service discovery, category exploration, search telemetry, and realistic case-manager query evaluation.
defaultPrompt: Find housing and food support in Oakland using Rosie.
List Rosie service categories before searching broadly.
Check Rosie search telemetry for the last 30 days.
Evaluate Rosie with realistic case-manager queries and identify the biggest search gaps.
